MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Citifinancial Auto's Application For Writ of Possession is granted. No opposition has been filed. No undertaking is required of Plaintiff. The undertaking required by Defendant for redelivery or to stay delivery is set in the amount of $8,175. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
